## ⚠️ Disclaimer

> **Important:** Please don't use your **real/main Telegram account** as an assistant.
> - The assistant account might **leave all groups & channels** automatically
> - You may **lose group ownership/admin rights**
> - Always use a **spare/fake account**

## 🚀 Deployment Methods

</div>

### ☁️ Deploy on Heroku

<div align="center">

[![Deploy On Heroku](https://img.shields.io/badge/Deploy%20To%20Heroku-6366f1?style=for-the-badge&logo=heroku&logoColor=white)](https://dashboard.heroku.com/new?template=https://github.com/SUDEEPBOTS/YUKIMUSIC)

</div>

---

### 💻 Deploy on VPS / Localhost

> **Requirements:** Python 3.11 · FFmpeg · Node.js · PM2

<details>
<summary><b>📋 Click to expand VPS Setup Guide</b></summary>

<br>

**1️⃣ Update System**
```bash
sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y
```

**2️⃣ Install Python 3.11**
```bash
sudo apt install software-properties-common -y
sudo add-apt-repository ppa:deadsnakes/ppa -y && sudo apt update
sudo apt install python3.11 python3.11-venv python3.11-dev -y
```

**3️⃣ Install Required Packages**
```bash
sudo apt install ffmpeg git curl nano nodejs npm -y
```

**4️⃣ Install PM2**
```bash
sudo npm install -g pm2
```

**5️⃣ Clone Repository**
```bash
git clone https://github.com/SUDEEPBOTS/YUKIMUSIC.git
cd YUKIMUSIC
```

**6️⃣ Create Virtual Environment**
```bash
python3.11 -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate
```

**7️⃣ Install Requirements**
```bash
pip install --upgrade pip
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

**8️⃣ Setup Environment Variables**
```bash
cp sample.env .env
nano .env
```

**9️⃣ Start Bot with PM2**
```bash
pm2 start "venv/bin/python -m YUKIMUSIC" --name YukiBot
pm2 save
```

**🔍 Check Logs**
```bash
pm2 logs YukiBot
```

</details>
